next_steps: Perform brain and spine MRI with gadolinium contrast to look for enhancement and meningeal inflammation
Submit CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR and antibody testing
Submit serum and CSF for parasitic serologic panels including Strongyloides, Gnathostoma, and Schistosoma
Send CSF for comprehensive viral PCR panel (including HSV, VZV, West Nile, and Enterovirus)
Consult infectious disease and neurology for management of suspected eosinophilic meningoencephalitis
Consider cautious adjustment of sedative medications given the patient's current encephalopathy
Continue supportive care including serial monitoring of intracranial pressure
